Elements/tbody/valign.name: valign
Elements/tbody/valign.description: Specifies the vertical alignment of each body cell. The possibleenumeratedvalues arebaseline,bottom,middle, andtop. Use thevertical-alignCSS property instead, as this attribute is deprecated.
